error.permissionDesc: Port Monitor needs permission to list listening ports. Grant it access in System Settings → Privacy & Security, then retry.
error.unknownDesc: Something went wrong while scanning ports. Try again.

actions.killContainer: Can't kill — this would stop the parent container service, not this container
actions.killGrouped: Can't kill one port — they share a process. Use the Kill above to stop it
actions.killProcess: Kill the process and all its children
actions.killEngine: Kill the engine and its containers

kill.title: Kill this process?
kill.descSigkill: Sends SIGKILL — force-stops immediately, no chance to clean up.
kill.descSigterm: Sends SIGTERM. Unsaved work in this process will be lost.

forceKill.title: Still running — force kill?
forceKill.desc: It ignored SIGTERM. SIGKILL force-stops it immediately.

stop.title: Stop this container?
stop.desc: Gracefully stops the container via its container service.
stop.timeout: Stop command timed out — the container may be slow to stop. Try again or check its container service.
stop.failed: Couldn't stop the container. Is its container service still running?

portRange.label: Port range
portRange.desc: Only show ports in this range.

grouping.label: Group by process
grouping.desc: Combine ports from the same process into one row.

resolveContainersNames.label: Resolve containers names
resolveContainersNames.desc: Name containers behind VM's (eg. Docker and others).

killSignal.label: Kill signal
killSignal.desc: Default signal the Kill button sends.

analytics.label: Share analytics
analytics.desc: Send anonymous crash & error reports to help improve the app.

feedback.label: Leave feedback
feedback.desc: Open an issue on GitHub to share ideas or report problems.
